chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1626 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5585/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.5586/2022 4. For orders on M.A No.5587/2022 5. For hearing of main case 19.04.2022 Ms. Rehana Siddiqui, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution for availing 600 free electricity units. It is the case of petitioner that despite availability of 600 free electricity units respondents have threatened him for disconnection of electricity. We are afraid that for the aforesaid query a petition would not lie against the respondents i.e HESCO, which entity is claimed to have been created under the Companies law. Be that as it may, as far as the entitlement of 600 free electricity units are concerned, petitioner may avail the remedy before the forum having jurisdiction including but not limited to Civil Court for the redressal of his grievance. This petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
